programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a big duplex and decide to make this project a competition. They renovate one side each and real estate agents pick the winner.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: A young couple finds their beautiful dream home located on a golf course, but its rundown, outdated design is far from their dream. Tamara and her team save the day by completely renovating this mansion.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: We continue our Mekong River cruise arriving in the Cambodian capital Phnom Penh before crossing the border into Vietnam and winding up at the magical Mekong Delta.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Mika and Brian create a fur-ever home with plenty of room for a couple and their nine dogs.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind is Worth Every Penny
programme.desc: A couple were convinced they could bring their new home up to code, but three kids later, they have even more problems than before.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are ready to serve Wetumpka's sole female police officer and youth advocate with the surprise renovation of her dreams.

programme.title: Small Town Potential
programme.desc: Davina and Kristin reno a diamond in the rough for a relocating couple.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Paris, Texas, to turn an 1800s cabin into a bridal suite, but they suffer a setback when most of the logs are missing tags.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A New York couple won $7 million on the lottery and said goodbye to hard work in the Big Apple and hello to sunny retirement in Florida. David Bromstad helps them shop for the perfect property.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: A reno project that delivers style, safety and fun in Sydney, something new and different a pool for ... dogs and on the waterfront of one of Australia's best beaches sits this acclaimed architect's latest pool.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A family with three young kids finds their forever lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. However, it is far from turnkey and the massive renovation may derail their lakeside living dreams.

programme.title: Holiday Homes in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Amanda Lamb, presenter JB Gill, and DJ and presenter Sam Pinkham are in Woolacombe, competing to find their favourite holiday rental.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: A family of four is building a glamping escape overlooking the Texas Hill Country, but the build process is anything but glamorous. With the rain, challenging terrain, they must work together.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: Builders attempt to deliver a luxury home to the top of a mountain, hauling massive modules up a steep, single-lane dirt road where one mistake could bring the entire project to a standstill.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Best Friends and Bunkmates in Florida
programme.desc: Longtime friends are hoping to pay all cash for a home in New Port Richey, Florida. One dreams of a single-family ranch with a backyard, but the other wants a two-story home with an HOA.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to realize their dream of living in downtown Los Angeles. They're looking for something with plenty of space to entertain, but their dollars may not stretch very far in the condo market.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Paradise and Practicality in Phuket, Thailand
programme.desc: A married couple chases a new adventure by moving from her home in Jordan to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After years of jumping from one city to the next, a young couple visits the Hague, Netherlands, for the first time, where they're looking for their first long-term home.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple from Alabama are excited to settle down for their next phase of life. Ben and Erin help them choose a forever home and give it a historic renovation with a gorgeous master suite, custom kitchen and screened-in porch.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: After a successful kitchen renovation, Christina returns to design a couple's bathroom. This time, Christina must balance the couple's differing styles.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A movie-loving couple wants to turn their builder-grade house into a customized home that reflects both their styles.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Mika and Brian are tasked to create a new home with ample storage and custom features for a family that's ready to spread out.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds look to realize their dream of living in downtown Los Angeles. They're looking for something with plenty of space to entertain, but their dollars may not stretch very far in the condo market.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple from Alabama are excited to settle down for their next phase of life. Ben and Erin help them choose a forever home and give it a historic renovation with a gorgeous master suite, custom kitchen and screened-in porch.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: After a successful kitchen renovation, Christina returns to design a couple's bathroom. This time, Christina must balance the couple's differing styles.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Brodie takes her dog Willow for a day out in North Melbourne. Livinia discovers a winery in Mount Macedon. Kris is at the Williamstown Sailing Club. And guest presenter Neary Ty visits a retro Chinese restaurant in Boronia.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: We continue our Mekong River cruise arriving in the Cambodian capital Phnom Penh before crossing the border into Vietnam and winding up at the magical Mekong Delta.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: Partners and their two dogs leave Cape Cod for a cabin in Norway, Maine, searching for a waterfront property. One is a contractor open to renovations, while the other wants a newer build.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.sub-title: From Dry Desert to Cooler Climes in Arizona
programme.desc: A family and their two dogs are leaving Tucson for a cabin in Mt. Lemmon. They want their kids to explore the forest, she needs to commute to work, and he hopes to get a deck while working from home.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave take on a tiny flip that has big potential. While Kortney deals with the design challenge of working with an extremely small space, Dave stresses the importance of a budget to his team.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A movie-loving couple wants to turn their builder-grade house into a customized home that reflects both their styles.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: Mika and Brian are tasked to create a new home with ample storage and custom features for a family that's ready to spread out.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: A reno project that delivers style, safety and fun in Sydney, something new and different a pool for ... dogs and on the waterfront of one of Australia's best beaches sits this acclaimed architect's latest pool.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: An attorney and single father of a three-year-old son scored $1 million on the Mega Millions. Now he's ready to move out of his rental and find the perfect father-son forever home.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple from Alabama are excited to settle down for their next phase of life. Ben and Erin help them choose a forever home and give it a historic renovation with a gorgeous master suite, custom kitchen and screened-in porch.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and her husband Steve decide it's time to renovate and sell their rental property to start a college fund for their son.

programme.title: Nate & Jeremiah Save My House
programme.desc: Nicole's father is recovering from cancer treatments, but a flood has destroyed her kitchen and must be repaired before he can move in. The pressure is on for Nate and Jeremiah to fix this home.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: We continue our Mekong River cruise arriving in the Cambodian capital Phnom Penh before crossing the border into Vietnam and winding up at the magical Mekong Delta.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Brodie takes her dog Willow for a day out in North Melbourne. Livinia discovers a winery in Mount Macedon. Kris is at the Williamstown Sailing Club. And guest presenter Neary Ty visits a retro Chinese restaurant in Boronia.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Retta check out a property that feels like the Titanic inside and out, an angled mess of a house with no walls and zero privacy, and a gigantic green box with a nasty backyard.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta heads out into the desert to visit a broken-down cabin with a cat problem, a dust-filled dome and a home stuck in the '70S.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors to find the frame fits incorrectly. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site. Meanwhile, Kyle slips and falls while installing windows.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A movie-loving couple wants to turn their builder-grade house into a customized home that reflects both their styles.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: Work continues on the week one rooms and Keith gives the teams a near impossible 24 hour deadline. The contestants quickly realise they need to keep the big picture in mind and some go shopping for their kitchens.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta takes an ugly hunt up and down the Pacific coast as she gets a tour of a linoleum-covered nightmare, a house with a staircase to hell and an oppressively hot home with a huge built-in solarium.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Among America's majestic mountains, comedian and actress Retta finds three ugly homes ready for a makeover.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: After a successful kitchen renovation, Christina returns to design a couple's bathroom. This time, Christina must balance the couple's differing styles.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Returning to Roots in Cairns, Australia
programme.desc: An Oregon couple looks to reconnect with family and give their kids a chance to live abroad in Cairns, Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Brits Buying in the Jungles of Costa Rica
programme.desc: After globe-trotting for four years, a couple looks to put down roots in Costa Rica. They're searching for a starter home, despite a lengthy wish list and plumbing problems.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A family looks to relocate from Washington and searches for a home in sunny Florida. She wants a place that's move-in ready, but he's not willing to let go of his drive for quirky projects.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave's latest flip serves as the training ground for their newest team member Kevin, who also happens to be Kortney's little brother. Will he be able to rise to the occasion?

programme.title: Small Town Potential
programme.sub-title: The Art of the House Search
programme.desc: Davina and Kristin turn an engaged couple's new house into a work of art.

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: With both hotels lacking amenities, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt are taking the competition outdoors, creating outdoor lounge areas and bringing in guest all-star designers.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Dreaming of a Suite Life by the Beach in Lusby, MD
programme.desc: After finding their dream beach house, a Virginia couple reworks the floor plan to create an expanded primary suite.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Returning to Roots in Cairns, Australia
programme.desc: An Oregon couple looks to reconnect with family and give their kids a chance to live abroad in Cairns, Australia.

programme.desc: A family looks to relocate from Washington and searches for a home in sunny Florida. She wants a place that's move-in ready, but he's not willing to let go of his drive for quirky projects.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave's latest flip serves as the training ground for their newest team member Kevin, who also happens to be Kortney's little brother. Will he be able to rise to the occasion?

programme.sub-title: The Art of the House Search
programme.desc: Davina and Kristin turn an engaged couple's new house into a work of art.

programme.desc: With both hotels lacking amenities, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt are taking the competition outdoors, creating outdoor lounge areas and bringing in guest all-star designers.
